name: Dread Incarnate
description: It makes you tremble with fear.
passive: Upon reaching 4 stacks, gains 400 STR and 3% HP regen for 5 seconds
Damaging an enemy will summon a tentacle that deals 50000 magic damage in line (cooldown: 5s)
Once it expires, has 5 second cooldown until it can start stacking again

active.name: Mayhem
effects: Sets ablaze a large area for 10 seconds, dealing 25000 damage per second
While the user is standing in the area, Dread will be set to max stacks and your skills will deal 10% bonus damage

name: Voidshard Armor
description: Forged from crystallized void energy. Hums with dark resonance.
passive: Taking damage has a 10% chance to release a void pulse, dealing 15000 magic damage to nearby enemies

name: Mask of Truth
description: Reveals what the wearer wishes to remain hidden.
passive: Skills reveal invisible enemies for 3 seconds
Gain 5% bonus damage against revealed targets

name: Ancient Tome
description: A book of forgotten knowledge. Its pages glow faintly.

name: Twisted Fragment of Ruins
description: A shard of a destroyed dimension, still warping space around it.

name: Soul Blossom
description: A flower that blooms only where souls have departed. Radiates gentle warmth.

name: Crimson Greatsword
description: A massive blade stained by the blood of countless undead. Its edge never dulls.
passive: Basic attacks have a 15% chance to inflict Bleed (3000 damage/s for 5s)
Killing a bleeding target restores 5% max HP

active.name: Crimson Execution
effects: Delivers a massive overhead slash dealing 80000 physical damage
Targets below 30% HP take double damage

name: Wings of the Fallen
description: Once pure white, these wings now shimmer between light and shadow. They carry the weight of a broken oath.
passive: Every 10 seconds, alternate between Light Aura (+20% healing received) and Dark Aura (+20% damage dealt)
On taking fatal damage, enter Fallen Grace: become invulnerable for 2 seconds and heal 30% HP (cooldown: 180s)

name: Pollen Crown
description: Woven from enchanted vines and perpetually blooming flowers. Spreads healing pollen to allies.
passive: Healing skills also apply a HoT (2% max HP/s for 4s) to targets within 5m of the healed ally

name: Root Tendril Wings
description: Living roots that have taken the shape of wings. They pulse with the heartbeat of the earth.
passive: While moving, leave a trail of vines that slow enemies by 30% for 2s
Standing still for 3s roots you in place but grants +25% damage reduction

active.name: Overgrowth Burst
effects: Slam roots into the ground, dealing 40000 nature damage in a large area
Rooted enemies take 50% more damage for 4 seconds

name: Duke's Signet
description: The Duke's personal seal. Still warm with cursed energy.
passive: Basic attacks deal bonus 5000 dark damage
Every 5th hit applies a curse reducing enemy healing received by 50% for 3s

name: Celestial Halo
description: A ring of solidified divine light. Bestows clarity of purpose upon its wearer.
passive: Skills have a 20% chance to trigger Divine Echo, repeating the skill at 30% effectiveness after 1s
While above 80% HP, gain +10% All Damage
